entries.summary: Finland began considering NATO membership after Russia's invasion of Ukraine.
Finland and Sweden veered closer to NATO in a historic policy shift.
Analysts said Finland and Sweden would likely soon apply for NATO membership.
Finland's leaders said the country must apply for NATO membership without delay.
Finland announced historic NATO bid with Sweden expected to follow shortly.
Analysts described the move as Moscow's full defeat on its western flank.
Finland and Sweden formally submitted their applications to join NATO.
US offered complete backing for NATO membership bids from Sweden and Finland.
Russia vowed countermeasures over the Finland-Sweden NATO accession bids.
Turkey lifted its veto on Finland and Sweden joining NATO at Madrid summit.
US Senate ratified Finland and Sweden's NATO accession protocols by 95-1 vote.
Turkey's parliament unanimously ratified Finland's NATO accession by 276-0 vote.
NATO chief said Finland would join the military alliance the following day.
Finland officially joined NATO as the alliance's 31st member state.
Hungary ratified Sweden's NATO bid, clearing the final obstacle to membership.
Sweden officially became NATO's 32nd member after submitting accession documents in Washington.
Finland and Sweden began openly weighing NATO membership for the first time.
Finland and Sweden mapped fast-track paths toward NATO accession following Russian invasion.
Analysts said Finnish membership would be Putin's worst geopolitical nightmare realised.
Biden welcomed Sweden's and Finland's accession bids as a major foreign policy victory.
Finland and Sweden's leaders met Biden at White House to discuss accession.
Senators wrote Biden urging swift Senate consideration of Finland-Sweden accession protocols.
Finland's foreign minister gave a Washington interview pressing Turkey to drop objections.
Turkey signalled it would still oppose Sweden and Finland's NATO bids.
Biden arrived at G7 and NATO summit prepared to address Turkey's objections.
Turkey lifted veto, paving way for Finland and Sweden's NATO accession.
US Senate voted 95-1 to ratify Finland and Sweden's NATO accession.
Senators wrote Biden linking Turkey F-16 sale to swift Sweden ratification.
Turkey signalled fresh objections to Sweden's NATO membership despite earlier Madrid deal.
Erdogan said Turkey would advance Finland's accession while keeping Sweden waiting.
Turkey continued blocking Sweden's NATO membership over Quran-burning protests.
Sweden formally joined NATO as the alliance's 32nd member state in Washington.
Sweden and Finland issued wartime preparedness guidance to citizens citing Russian threat.
